user.title: BlueRadar
user.description: Set up BlueRadar — rich Bluetooth Low Energy device management for Home Assistant.

track.name: Track BLE device
track.description: Add a BLE MAC address to BlueRadar's tracked devices.

untrack.name: Untrack BLE device
untrack.description: Remove a BLE MAC address from BlueRadar's tracked devices.

refresh.name: Refresh BLE list
refresh.description: Force a re-poll of the bluetooth integration's device list.
